description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin with a dark, weathered exterior and horizontal plank siding. The roof is a single-sloped shed style, covered with wide, overlapping boards and supported by visible rafters extending beyond the walls. The front facade features a centered, aged wooden door with a slightly greenish patina, framed by thick vertical beams. On one side, there is a single, small, square-paned window with a wooden frame, providing minimal natural light. The cabin sits on a wooden platform or deck that extends slightly beyond the walls, suggesting a raised foundation. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for use as a simple shelter or outbuilding in an urban or park setting.
description: A small, rustic wooden cabin with a slanted shed roof, weathered plank siding, a central door, and a single side window, all set on a wooden platform.
description_view_0: The view shows the rear of the cabin, featuring horizontal wooden planks and thick vertical corner beams, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_1: This is the front view, displaying the central wooden door beneath the overhanging shed roof and exposed rafters.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a single, small, square window set into the plank wall, with the roof overhanging above.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the cabin, similar to the rear, has no windows or doors and features the same plank siding and roof overhang.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, wide overhang, and exposed rafters, constructed from wooden planks
attribute_window_arrangement: one small, square window with a wooden frame, located on one side wall, asymmetrically placed with no grouping
attribute_door_placement: one exterior door, centered on the front facade beneath the roof overhang
